_comment: Each entry defines an alternative checkpoint/restart mechanism to compare against VeloC.
name            - unique identifier (used as codebase label in metrics and reports)
label           - human-readable name shown in report tables and plots
enabled         - set to false to skip without removing the entry
type            - approach type; determines which runner module to use
codebase_dir    - source directory (relative to repo root, or absolute path)
executable_name - built executable name (null = same as --executable-name)
install_prefix  - for DMTCP: tool install location (null = auto-discover)

approaches.name: dmtcp
approaches.label: DMTCP (Transparent Checkpointing)
approaches._comment_app_args: DMTCP arg order: <file> <center> <beg_index> <num_iter> <num_outer_iter> <num_sino>. beg_index at argv[3] (MANA corrupts this position, but 0 is the default). num_outer_iter=500 at argv[5] (safe).

approaches.name: criu
approaches.label: CRIU (OS-level Checkpointing)
approaches._comment: CRIU uses the original binary unchanged. num_outer_iter=500 for ~500s runtime, giving time for checkpoint + kill + restore. ssim_threshold=0.9999 because output should be bit-identical after restore.
